official_functions.role: Provide the official Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound keep_alive input id, framed payload, packet table id, and body bytes.
Provide the official Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound keep_alive response frame for the mapped input id.

invariants: The inbound network frame is derived from the existing official Configuration clientbound keep_alive framed answer artifact.
Conn::read_packet() must decode the inbound official network frame while Conn is in State::Configuration.
Packet::map() must produce MappedPacket::KeepAliveClientbound with the official input id.
packet::send_keep_alive(&mut Conn, id) must use that mapped id.
With compression threshold disabled, the observed response bytes must be VarInt(length of official serverbound framed payload) followed by the official serverbound framed payload.
This contract is limited to protocol-crate socket echo behavior and does not claim the full spawn_reader thread path.
test_topology_note: This runtime metadata is stored below oracle/*/775/runtime and is not currently discovered by the jar-backed direct-file runner.
stop_boundary: Do not use this protocol echo probe to infer full login/configuration runtime behavior, spawn_reader scheduling behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
